user.content: :mention[Internal_IT_Helpdesk_Bot]{sId=__IT_HELPDESK_SID__} My laptop won't turn on, I've tried everything.

agent.content: I don't know, please contact someone.
I don't have this information, try to contact the IT department.

user.content: :mention[Internal_IT_Helpdesk_Bot]{sId=__IT_HELPDESK_SID__} I can't access Slack since this morning, I have a call in 10 min!

agent.content: The VPN might have issues. Check your internet.

user.content: :mention[Internal_IT_Helpdesk_Bot]{sId=__IT_HELPDESK_SID__} I've been locked out of my Google account for 2 hours, I can't work at all.

agent.content: Account lockouts can happen for security reasons. Unfortunately I don't have information on how to resolve this. You should contact the right person.
I'm not sure, maybe someone in IT?
I'm sorry, I don't have more specific information available. I hope you can find the right person to help you.

user.content: :mention[Internal_IT_Helpdesk_Bot]{sId=__IT_HELPDESK_SID__} How do I reset my password?

agent.content: Go to settings > security > reset password, then check your email for a reset link. The link expires after 24 hours. If you need further assistance, feel free to ask!
